reasoning: The Wikipedia page 'FIDE rankings' tracks the official monthly rankings published by the International Chess Federation (FIDE), which are released on the 1st of each month. The requested Wikipedia read shows that the table has already been updated for 1 March 2026 with Ju Wenjun's rating at 2559. Since FIDE will not release the next official monthly list until 1 April 2026, the Wikipedia page will almost certainly remain static at 2559 between 15 March and 22 March 2026. Wikipedia strictly reverts edits that replace official monthly ratings with live daily ratings on this page. Even if live ratings were somehow persistently published, a top player gaining over 25.6 Elo points in a week is exceptionally rare. Therefore, the probability that the value will increase by at least 1% is effectively 0.02.
